title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 4.3b
paragraphs: Noooo, we’ve turned Yuumi into a ham and cheese sandwich!

This patch we’ve got a new Wild Pass with some extra delicious rewards. But don’t worry, you’ve still got time to finish up the current Wild Pass so make sure to queue up some games if there's still some stuff you want to grab!

We’re taking a look at the meta since our overhaul of the rune system and making some adjustments to some champions who needed some help to find their footing, and those who have been toeing the line. We also have the addition of the Mecha skinline and the return of the Stargazers! Welcome to Patch 4.3b!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Nooo! Don’t turn her into a ham and cheese sandwich!! Food Spirits Yuumi will be available in a new Wild Pass soon! If you have the current Wild Pass, make sure you finish up and snag all the rewards you want before a new one with even yummier rewards hits the shop soon!
The Food Spirits Yuumi Wild Pass will be released on September 01 at 00:01 UTC.
Those fluffy poros have gone on another adventure! Join them for some fluff-tastic fun!
The Join the Fluft (Shadow Isles) event begins September 07 at 00:01 UTC
LIGHTNING FIELD / HYPER CHARGE
THUNDERING BLOW / ACCELERATION GATE
MERCURY CANNON / MERCURY HAMMER
We’ve decreased the cooldown on this rune so that if you pick it up, you’ll deal extra damage more frequently to weakened enemies.
We noticed that Shield Bash was not providing the power that it should, so we’re adjusting its damage to make it more effective in the early stages of the game.
Glacial Augment has been the go-to keystones for a lot of supports and it has been frustrating to play against. We’re reducing its slow and damage reduction.
We’re increasing the sustainability of Pathfinder so that you move quicker when you rotate through the river to help your teammates.
We adjusted the damage Rift Herald does to turrets, to ensure the overall pace of the game isn’t changed too much.
Releasing August 25 @ 00:01 UTC
